reason: Added StopLimit order type, trigger price model fields, validation, repository persistence, and service reservation support.
Accepted stop_limit spot orders, returned trigger_price, included trigger price in idempotency checks, and executed triggered stop-limit orders from market feed price updates.
Added spot_orders.trigger_price and an index for stop-limit trigger scans.
Mapped PC STOP_LIMIT requests and backend stop_limit responses, including triggerPrice.
Exposed triggerPrice in PC spot order request params.
Added stop-limit tab, trigger price input, validation, and request payload wiring.
Displayed stop-limit trigger price in open/history order tables and cancel confirmation.
Added stop-limit order type and trigger price validation translations.
Documented stop-limit API, reservation, trigger, and test contracts.
